User.title: User
User.description: User profile state, XP, coins, streak, and completion lists

coins.description: NovaCoins quantity available for making purchases

completedLessons.description: Language mapped chapter numbers completed in text

completedQuizzes.description: Language mapped quizzes completed on correct answers

completedAssignments.description: Language mapped hands-on code files processed

purchasedItems.description: Unique identifiers of bought store options

level.description: Overall calculated level based on 250XP thresholds

lastStreakUpdate.description: ISO date string representing user action today

users/{userId}.description: User accounts which contain gamified progress stats
